heading: Styled 404 page
description: A custom 404 page has been implemented to enhance user experience when they navigate to a non-existent page on the site.

heading: Confirmed delete account functionality
description: Users are able to delete their accounts.

heading: Fixed chat ended status issue
description: Resolved issue where if a chat has ended, it will disable the textarea and not only the 'end chat' button.

heading: Fixed conversation deletion issue
description: Resolved issue where if both users close a conversation with each other, the conversation doesn't get deleted. Now, if all participants of a conversation have hidden it, the conversation history will be deleted from the database.

heading: Added contact form functionality
description: The contact form on the website is now functional, allowing users to send messages directly to the support team. This will enable users to easily reach out for assistance, report issues, or provide feedback, improving overall communication and support for the platform.
